programme.title: Capítulo 137
programme.desc: Roberta asks Paola to tell Diego the truth of her relationship with León. Diego leaves with Paola. Franco tries to pay Alma to stay away from Mia. Alma and Roberta cry for their loves. Gastón tells Mia he has a love he can't get out of his head; he embraces her a second time.

programme.title: Capítulo 138
programme.desc: Alma reveals to Franco, in a big way, how she spent his bribe money. Teo steals all the other teachers wallets and puts them in Pascual's desk in order to save José. Roberta gets Mabel to go look for Diego. Galia, Pascual and Pilar's wife and mother respectively, becomes the new English teacher.

programme.title: Capítulo 139
programme.desc: The Lodge is upset that they failed in getting José expelled. José meets her tutor face to face. Franco finds out that Mia like a man; not a boy at the school. Mia, in anger, tells her father she's in love with Gastón; however Gastón is not worried. Later, when Mia becomes upset at the sight of Viviana with Miguel, Gastón kisses her.

programme.title: Capítulo 140
programme.desc: Gastón kisses Mia for the first time. Franco believes that Alma is cheating on Carlo. Nico tells Teo he might like José more than he knows. Mia tells Gastón she's harassed by Miguel at school. Franco follows the alleged cheater and finds out he's in charge of Mia's model campaign. Raquel and Giovanni begin to date; Tomás and him fight. Teo is saved by a fellow Lodge member. Gastón tells Mia he wants to take care of her for life.

programme.title: Capítulo 141
programme.desc: Teo tells Miguel and Nico that the room guard of the Lodge has a black eye; they look for suspects. Celina becomes depressed because of her break up with Augusto; she binge eats. Roberta and Pepa go to Puebla City. León finds out Diego left school.

programme.title: Capítulo 142
programme.desc: León reveals to Mabel that Paola is a prostitute. Giovanni lies to Raquel about his family, saying they're royalty. José tries to help Celina with the PE test. Mia forgets to do her math homework; Gastón brings it to class completed. Renata makes the students participate in a math competition. Celina gets injured during the test. Mia angers Gastón when she goes to Madariaga for help. León finds Diego with Roberta at the hotel.

programme.title: Capítulo 143
programme.desc: Pilar tries to get Lupita and Tomás together for hidden reasons. Paola rejects Diego after seeing León. Miguel, Nico, and Teo plan to follow Tomás and Giovanni to see which is in the Lodge. Giovanni hires a man to pose as his rich father. León tells Diego that Paola is a whore. Nico and Miguel get ambushed by the suspect. Celina is comforted by Miguel on the subject of image.

programme.title: Capítulo 144
programme.desc: Gastón invites Mia out on a date. Giovanni's fake parents aren't what they seem. Vico follows Celina to find out her secret appointment. Carlo tells Roberta he has a surprise for her. Franco and Valeria come to see if Mia lied about staying at school so she could go out with Gastón.

programme.title: Capítulo 145
programme.desc: Carlo and Roberta go drag racing. Giovanni tries to ride a horse. Vico realizes the place Celina visited. Nico tries to ruin Lupita's date. León has Diego fight his anger out. Raquel finds out Giovanni lied. Diego give Nico his guitar; Nico sees the matching shoes in Diego, Tomás, Giovanni's room. Roberta and Carlo are arrested; revealing Mia's lie.

programme.title: Tercer hija
programme.desc: Paula arrives at Aníbal's room and tells him that he has a third daughter, José Angel takes her out of there.

programme.title: Revelación
programme.desc: Paula le dice a Cristina q Aníbal está en la clínica y q Guzmán y Beatriz son sus hijos. Leo se despide de Guillo. La mamá de leo golpea a Guzmán.

programme.title: Plan de embarazo
programme.desc: Arriaga le dice a Victoria q ella es una excelente madre. Adriana busca a Paula. Kendra quiere conquistar a Nelson con el plan de embarazo.

programme.title: Plática pendiente
programme.desc: Aníbal le habla a Adriana de su hija. Pone a Niki en contra de Adriana. Victoria está molesta con Arriaga. Arriaga aconseja a Adriana. Leo de quiere vengar de salcero. Kendra lleva a Cristina a Cozumel.

programme.title: La madre de Guzmán
programme.desc: Stefan visita a Victoria y Jean Marie lo atiende. Niki visita su psicólogo. Aníbal manda un cheque al Dr. Montaño. Paula va a dar clases a Niki y le hace confidencias a Victoria. Niki enfrenta a Paula.

programme.title: Otra hermana
programme.desc: Victoria intercede por Paula con Guzmán. Paula va a ver a Aníbal. Ella le dice q tiene otra hija. Aníbal cita a Arriaga para callarlo. Victoria lo sigue. Salcero es atacados by Leo. Kendra habla mal de salcero a Cristina.

programme.title: Bendición de boda
programme.desc: Guzmán ayuda a Salcero. Adriana amenaza a Paula para q hable. Victoria le dice a Arriaga q el solo es su escolta. Nelson le dice a Niki q el aprueba q se case con Roy. Guzmán los escucha.

programme.title: Futura infidelidad
programme.desc: Roy no llega a su cita con Niki. Ella le dice a Guzmán q está feliz con su prometido. Victoria está celosa de Opalina.

programme.title: Desaparición nocturna
programme.desc: Niki está celosa q Guzmán pase la noche fuera. Opalina aconseja a Arriaga. Guzmán descubre a Adriana.

programme.title: Desinterés del pasado
programme.desc: Aníbal sale del hospital. Nelson hace confidencias a salcero. Kendra pretende chantajear a Cristina. Victoria confronta a Aníbal.

programme.title: Conserje aprendiz
programme.desc: Lorena acepta hacer un casting para interpretar el papel de La Doña. Germán decide enseñarle a Borrego a ser un gran conserje.

programme.title: El perfume
programme.desc: Magdalena se aprovecha de las náuseas que siente Silvia por el embarazo para que Luis le compre todo lo que ella quiere.

programme.title: Apolonio y la víbora
programme.desc: Vanesa lleva una serpiente al edificio y se le escapa. Ahora tiene que recuperarla sin que los vecinos se enteren. Silvia y Luis toman un curso psicoprofiláctico con una chica que resulta ser la ex de Luis.

programme.title: La chapa
programme.desc: Luis descompone la chapa de la reja, quedando él y Silvia afuera y el resto de los vecinos adentro. En lo que reparan la chapa, los vecinos usan a Luis de mandadero.

programme.title: Los tocatimbres
programme.desc: Germán cree que los timbres del edificio están embrujados, pues alguien los hace sonar constantemente. Luis intenta colocar unas repisas en el cuarto del bebé.

programme.title: Arturo más pordiosero
programme.desc: Los López Pérez se hacen pasar por pordioseros para recibir caridad. Pedro lleva varios días sin bañarse y Cris le exige que lo haga.

programme.title: El parto
programme.desc: Silvia comienza el trabajo de parto en el departamento, no hay tiempo para llegar al hospital. Luis recibirá al bebé con la ayuda de los vecinos.

programme.title: Vecinos consejeros
programme.desc: El hijo de Silvia y Luis no para de llorar y ya no saben qué hacer. Los vecinos les aconsejan cómo cuidar al bebé mientras Germán improvisa un gimnasio en el vestíbulo.

programme.title: Mucha luz
programme.desc: Hay fallas de energía eléctrica en algunos de los departamentos y Luis tiene que ir a trabajar al departamento de los López Pérez. Germán se prepara para su examen de admisión a la preparatoria en línea.

programme.title: Ya valió barriga
programme.desc: Un nuevo inquilino llega al departamento, su nombre es: Hipólito Menchaca y tiene un gran parecido con el famoso actor Édgar Vivar. Los vecinos quieren quedar bien con él.

programme.title: La jefa del Rocko
programme.desc: La mamá de Rocko viene a conocer a su nieto Morris y tiene la intención de llevarlo a vivir con ella y darle la vida que se merece. Liz se vuelve representante de Benito y le consigue un papel en una película.

programme.title: Conserjerito inglés
programme.desc: Germán y compañía toman clases de inglés en línea con Silvia. Cuando Miss Silvia reprueba a Germán, este descubre la forma de desquitarse. Rocko tiene problemas de oído y creen que se está quedando sordo.

programme.title: La toalla del mojado 2
programme.desc: Frankie recibe una visita inesperada, la famosa actriz Lyn May, quien lo inspira a que haga la película de La toalla del mojado 2. Pedro se encarga de cuidar a Luisito Jr. para que Luis pueda descansar.

programme.title: La veterinaria de Vanesa
programme.desc: Vanesa por fin cumple el sueño de tener su propia veterinaria y, con ayuda de su novio Fabián, renta el local que está en el edificio. Los López Pérez compran una lavadora nueva y la colocan en el pasillo frente al departamento de Luis.

programme.title: ¡Qué escándalo!
programme.desc: Morris aprende a tocar la batería y los vecinos se quejan por el ruido. Silvia y Luis descubren que ese ruido arrulla al bebé.

programme.title: Arturo influencer
programme.desc: Arturo se vuelve un famoso influencer de TikTok y Paco de Miguel lo busca para una colaboración. Cris recibe la visita de su hermana Esmeralda y Pedro se siente desplazado.

programme.title: El novio de Virginia
programme.desc: Silvia acude a un diplomado que dura dos días y quiere contratar a una niñera, pero Luis no está de acuerdo. Virginia le quiere declarar su amor a un chico y Germán piensa que es él.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: Eat My Dust
programme.desc: The rough terrain of a high-speed pursuit proves both dangerous and useful for deputies; police find more than a stolen air conditioner in the trunk of a messy van; a confused man loses track of what's in his pockets.

programme.title: In Hot Water
programme.desc: A runaway biker makes multiple clumsy attempts to slip away from deputies; a shady figure has a curious method of trying to get a drink of water; a young woman starts making unwise choices when her family leaves town.

programme.title: Mr. Clean Getaway
programme.desc: A man in possession of a stolen car explains his unique nickname to deputies; police go to the same house twice in under 30 minutes to sort out a messy marital spat; a mom with multiple priors is caught in a bind.

programme.title: Get to the Point
programme.desc: A deputy tries to level with a man who has struggled with addiction for a decade; security guards at an aquarium warn officers about a man with a gun; a masked cyclist has no luck out-pedaling the officer on his tail.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Police officers, constables and sheriff's deputies patrol the streets for car thieves, drug pushers, sex-trade workers, violent thugs and anyone else on the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Take a Ride With Me
programme.desc: A traffic stop turns dangerous when a driver takes off with a deputy halfway inside the vehicle; recent changes in the law and a forthright attitude help a man avoid jail time; a neighborhood man gives motorists a scare.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A young couple allegedly spend too much time arguing instead of paying attention to the road; an officer uses a trick to catch someone in a lie; a chatty driver racks up a slew of charges in front of his own house.

programme.title: The Panel Gets Dirty
programme.desc: Host JB Smoove welcomes Goop founder and CEO Gwyneth Paltrow, Ring Doorbell creator Jamie Siminoff, and Amazon executive Carmen Nestares to hear pitches from 4 different entrepreneurs. A backyard party game, an emergency medical device, a dirty snack food, and a 'magic in a bottle' product compete for a spot in Amazon's exclusive Buy It Now Store and the chance to win $20,000.

programme.title: The Bug Scream
programme.desc: Host JB Smoove welcomes Emmy winner and social media sensation Tabitha Brown, Ring Doorbell creator Jamie Siminoff, and Amazon executive Michelle Rothman to hear pitches from 4 entrepreneurs. A slay-ing beauty tool, the daddy of all cleaning appliances, a fashion item that fits the bill, and a quirky home tool compete for a spot in Amazon's exclusive Buy It Now Store and the chance to win $20,000.

programme.title: Turning Up The Spice
programme.desc: Host JB Smoove welcomes comedian and AC Barbeque founder Anthony Anderson, Ring Doorbell creator Jamie Siminoff, and Amazon executive Tanner Elton to hear pitches from 4 entrepreneurs. programme.title: MeatEater - Bear With Seal: Alaska Bear Hunt Part 1
programme.desc: Steven Rinella will take Navy SEAL Rorke Denver on his first hunt deep into the Alaskan backcountry to search for black bears in the mighty Alaska Range. In the remote wilderness, two friends will look into the differences and similarities between the hunter and the warrior. The bears are out but Rorke and Steve will have to work hard to put a tag on one.

programme.title: MeatEater - Bear With Seal: Alaska Bear Hunt Part 2
programme.desc: Steven Rinella will take Navy SEAL Rorke Denver on his first hunt deep into the Alaskan backcountry to search for black bears in the mighty Alaska Range. In the remote wilderness, two friends will look into the differences and similarities between the hunter and the warrior. The bears are out but Rorke and Steve will have to work hard to put a tag on one.

programme.title: MeatEater - Yukon Giants: Northern Alaska Moose Part 1
programme.desc: Dropped off by bushplane on a remote lakeside in the wilderness of Alaska's Brooks Range, Steven Rinella and wildlife biologist Brandt Meixell have ten days of hunting before the plane returns. Big-antlered Yukon moose are few and far between but hard work pays off for hunters who stick with it until the bitter end.

programme.title: MeatEater - Yukon Giants: Northern Alaska Moose Part 2
programme.desc: Dropped off by bushplane on a remote lakeside in the wilderness of Alaskas Brooks Range.

programme.title: MeatEater - Deer the Hard Way: Prince of Wales Island (Joe Rogan and Bryan Callen)
programme.desc: Steven Rinella has hunted this area before, but he feels he's just scratched the surface exploring the surrounding country. The top of the mountain is always calling Steve's name, and for this serious Alaskan backpack hunt he's bringing along comedians Joe Rogan and Bryan Callen. Cold, wet weather and tough hunting for wily Sitka deer make this a southeast Alaskan adventure these hunters will never forget.

programme.title: MeatEater - Burger Extravaganza Cooking Special
programme.desc: As the prime cuts are often the first to go, most families are left with a freezer brimming with ground wild game meat. Pulled from the pages of his forthcoming Wild Game Cookbook, Steve shares a variety of recipes from burger to meatloaf and more ‚Äì designed to whittle down this supply and jazz up your ground meat game.

programme.title: MeatEater - Welcome to the Jungle: Adventures in Bolivia Part 1
programme.desc: Steve is fascinated by indigenous people who live in the wilds South America. In this three-part series, he travels deep into the Amazon jungle to hunt with and learn from the locals there. Not only will this be one heck of a hunting adventure, it will be a mind-opening, life-changing event. From bowfishing to hunting in the jungle at night, you never know what the evening's menu will bring.

programme.title: MeatEater - Welcome to the Jungle: Adventures in Bolivia Part 2
programme.desc: Steve is fascinated by indigenous people who live in the wilds South America.

programme.title: MeatEater - Welcome to the Jungle: Adventures in Bolivia Part 3
programme.desc: Steve is fascinated by indigenous people who live in the wilds South America.

programme.title: MeatEater - About Time: Helen and Brittany Hunt Elk in Montana
programme.desc: Brittany and Helen have put more work in on MeatEater than just about anyone else, but have yet to hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater - Sky Island Solitaire: Backpack Hunting Coues Deer in Arizona
programme.desc: Steve returns to southern Arizona to stalk the elusive Coues deer. Unaccompanied, Steve immerses himself in the quiet southwest desert and gets intimate with one of the most wary animals in the west. Throughout the hunt, Steve articulates why solo time in trophy country is good for the soul.

programme.title: MeatEater - Ribeye of the Sky: Sandhill Cranes in West Texas
programme.desc: Steve and bird hunting aficionado Ronny Boehme join up with wildlife biologist Ed Arnett in Lubbock, Texas.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Coldest Hunt: Nunivak Island Muskox
programme.desc: Lightning strikes twice: Steven Rinella has somehow beaten the odds and drawn a second Muskox tag after having to forfeit his first one four years ago due to unforeseen circumstances. Steve has always regretted passing up an opportunity to hunt Muskox but with another tag in his pocket, nothing will stop this adventure. We learn about the native history and culture of Nunivak Island's as Steve tries to stay warm while chasing Muskox 30 miles offshore in the Bering Sea.

programme.title: MeatEater - Gobbling: California Turkeys
programme.desc: The last time Joe Rogan and Bryan Callen went out with Steven Rinella they were soaked head to toe and came home meatless. To remedy their meat crisis while keeping them dry, Steve sets up a springtime wild turkey hunt in sunny California. Steve gives Joe and Bryan the A to Z on hunting, butchering, and cooking the wild turkey. Steve caps off the introductory lesson by preparing his favorite turkey recipe: Schnitzel.

programme.title: MeatEater - Unconventional: Alaska Sooty Grouse Part 1
programme.desc: In the first part of this series, Steve attempts a unique spring hunt for sooty grouse in the coastal rainforests of southeast Alaska. These mysterious hooters make for a hunt that is markedly different from any other and success doesn't come easily. They say blind squirrels can find a nut, but will Steve harvest a grouse?

programme.title: MeatEater - Unconventional: Alaska Sooty Grouse Part 2
programme.desc: In Part One, Steve experienced the difficulty of hunting the Sooty grouse of southeast Alaska.

programme.title: Lousiana Spearfishing and Bowfishing
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to the coast of Louisiana to spearfish and bowfish with Ronnie Collins and Greg Fonts. With ideal conditions, Steve receives a last minute invitation from Ronnie to spearfish during the reintroduced spring Amberjack season. Afterwards, the crew stays up for a late evening of bowfishing for red drum.

programme.title: MeatEater - Montana Muzzleloader Hunting for Mule Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella takes on Montana’s week-long big game heritage season with a traditional muzzleloader. With flintlock in hand, Steve’s after mule deer in a desolate and broken sage brush landscape. After a long few months of evading hunters, these deer have perfected how to stay alive. But stalking a deer into range isn’t the only hurdle to navigate.

programme.title: Class Reunion
programme.desc: Edith gets an invitation to attend her 30th high school class reunion, but when Archie refuses to escort her, she decides not to go. When her Cousin Amelia shows up to question Edith about her decision, Edith learns that an old flame, Buck, will be attending the reunion. Suddenly, Archie decides that he would like to go. However, when Buck does finally show up, Archie is in for a surprise since the once good looking track star seems to have lost his good looks.

programme.title: The Hot Watch
programme.desc: Archie comes home with a brand new watch and claims that he got a bargain on it, since he was told that it was a $300 watch and he got it for $25. Later, Archie is crestfallen when he discovers that the watch is broken. Meanwhile, Mike is convinced that the watch is stolen and encourages Archie to be careful, since the serial number may lead the jeweler to discover that indeed Archie has a hot watch. Thus, Archie scrambles to find a jeweler who will fix it with no questions asked.

programme.title: Everybody Tells The Truth
programme.desc: Archie, Edith, Mike and Gloria go out to a French restaurant and recall the events of the day. Each one of them has a vastly different version of the day's events. It seems that the Bunker's refrigerator is on the fritz and a pair of repairmen enter the scene. However, in the end, the fridge doesn't get repaired and it's Edith's version of the day that explains why it didn't get fixed.

programme.title: Archie Learns His Lesson
programme.desc: Archie swears Edith into secrecy when he begins attending night-school classes to qualify for a high school diploma in hopes of getting a promotion at work. However, Edith spills the beans and soon Mike and Archie must learn to share a study space, but that proves to be difficult.

programme.title: Gloria, The Victim
programme.desc: Gloria comes home from work in a most unusual mood. She later confides in Edith that on the way to work, she had been attacked by a construction worker near a construction site. When Mike and Archie find out about this, they try to encourage her to report it, but she is hesitant and totally uncomfortable with the idea of telling a detective all the details of the crime.

programme.title: The Battle Of The Month
programme.desc: Being her time of the month, Gloria is in a complete foul mood and gets into a big argument with Edith, lambasting her for letting Archie boss her around. Soon, Gloria gets into a big fight with Mike and decides to sleep on the couch, however, no one can sleep when Mike and Gloria's bickering keeps Archie and Edith up. Meanwhile, all of this puts a damper on Gloria's birthday celebration.

programme.title: Archie The Gambler
programme.desc: Archie comes home in a great mood, bearing gifts of perfume for Gloria and bubble bath for Edith.

programme.title: Henry's Farewell
programme.desc: Henry Jefferson seems to be moving away to open up his own cleaning store in another county and Louise and Lionel are planning a going away party.

programme.title: We're Having A Heat Wave
programme.desc: A heat wave hits New York, putting all of the Bunkers in bad moods and, to put salt on an already open wound, the air conditioner breaks down.

programme.title: We're Still Having A Heat Wave
programme.desc: The new neighbors, Irene and Frank Lorenzo, settle into the house next door.

programme.title: Edith's Winning Ticket
programme.desc: When Edith finds some old lottery tickets that she has totally forgotten about, Archie hits the roof claiming she was wasting money. However, Archie's attitude quickly changes when the family discovers that one of the tickets is a winner, but there is a catch: Edith claims the tickets don't belong to her, but belong to George Jefferson.

programme.title: Archie Is Branded
programme.desc: One morning Archie gets up, goes to his front door to get the newspaper and is shocked to discover that someone has painted a swastika on his front door. Archie soon gets into a debate with Mike as to who could have painted it and why. As Archie is calling the police to report it, the Bunker home gets a visit from a man from a Hebrew vigilante group who wants to plan some retaliation.

programme.title: Archie And The Bowling Team
programme.desc: Archie comes home in a fantastic mood for a change and it's all because he has the chance to possibly join a prestigious bowling team, the Cannonballers. After waiting six years, it seems that there is finally a vacancy on the team and Archie is planning to try out, even though the team practices discrimination in admitting members.

programme.title: Archie In The Hospital
programme.desc: Archie has been suffering from a terrible pain in his back and has become a terrible pain to Edith, who has been waiting on him hand and foot. When the doctor takes a look at him, he orders Archie to be admitted to the hospital for tests. This is where Archie befriends the other patient in his room, but because of a partition, Archie doesn't realize the man is black.

programme.title: Oh Say Can You See
programme.desc: Archie begins to realize that he's not as young as he used to be when he finds that he may need glasses. To make matters worse, middle-aged Archie can only envy the eternally youthful outlook of his friend and contemporary, Bill Mulheron. He is especially impressed that the toned, flashily garbed Bill has managed to attract a sexy young bedmate named Tina. However, Archie soon discovers all is not as it seems.

programme.title: Archie Goes Too Far
programme.desc: Archie is searching the house for a magazine to prove to Mike that he was right concerning a debate that they are having. However, Archie oversteps his boundaries and searches Mike's room where he discovers a poem that Mike once wrote. This leads to a huge argument concerning privacy and Mike storms out to Lionel's while Gloria and Edith storm out and have a slumber party at the apartment of one of Gloria's friends.

programme.title: Class Reunion
programme.desc: Edith gets an invitation to attend her 30th high school class reunion, but when Archie refuses to escort her, she decides not to go. When her Cousin Amelia shows up to question Edith about her decision, Edith learns that an old flame, Buck, will be attending the reunion. Suddenly, Archie decides that he would like to go. However, when Buck does finally show up, Archie is in for a surprise since the once good looking track star seems to have lost his good looks.

programme.title: Hours Of Desperation
programme.desc: Charlie's Angels must carry out an unusual assignment: three men have stolen a sack of rubies, and when one of them, Murdoch, double-crosses his two partners by escaping with the rubies, the other two hire the Angels to recover the missing jewels. The Angels are not "hired" exactly; Sabrina is forced to put on a belt loaded with explosives, and if the rubies are not recovered within twelve hours, the belt will set off by remote control. The designer of this belt is the one who masterminded the jewel theft, a psychotic electronics wizard named Dinsmore. From the crazy look in his eye, the Angels decide they better do as he says, so Kris and Kelly go out looking for Murdoch. Since Dinsmore shot him in the back as he was running away, they check the hospital first , but after the bullet was removed, Murdoch left in a hurry in order to sell the rubies. Charlie locates two men who helped the crooks steal the gems and who may be of use, if they can be forced to talk. Kris and Kelly leave these two locked in a bathroom naked after getting the information they need, and continue their search. By some excellent acting over the phone, Sabrina makes Dinsmore think that Kris has run off with Murdoch and the rubies, so he and Sabrina head for the airport to stop them. It is part of an elaborate plan to separate Dinsmore from the belt-exploding device, and it calls for Sabrina to dive into a puddle of muddy water where the radio signal won't reach the belt. At least she hopes it doesn't! Kate Jackson, Jaclyn Smith. and Cheryl Ladd star as the Angels, Sabrina Duncan, Kelly Garrett and Kris Munroe, respectively, who work for Charlie, an unseen and very sophis-ticated boss who phones in their instructions. David Doyle stars as Bosley, Charlie's harried assistant.

programme.title: Diamond In The Rough
programme.desc: "Freddie the Fox" Brander is retired, but thirty years ago he was the world's greatest thief. Still dignified and charming as in days of old, he is disturbed in his retirement by two former crime partners who are sure that Freddie has the famous "Light of Arabia" diamond. They are preparing to torture him into revealing where it is, but Freddie escapes and goes straight to Charlie's Angels for help. He knows that the diamond is in the possession of oil sheik Faris Salim, who keeps it in his extremely well-guarded Caribbean estate. Freddie's plan is for the Angels to assist him in stealing the diamond once again, so that he can return it to the museum, and retire from crime forever. The Angels eagerly accept the job, and assume new identities for the Caribbean caper. Freddie and Sabrina become Lord and Lady Brander, with Bosley as their butler and Kelly as their private secretary. Kris pretends to be a racing car enthusiast in order to win the attention of Ali, Salim's mechanic-minded son. The idea is for everyone to get invited to Salim's birthday party, and once in the house, learn where the diamond is kept so Freddie can decide how to steal it. Since Salim has an affinity for nobility, invitations are not difficult to obtain. At the party, while Sabrina snaps pictures from a secret camera planted in her jeweled pin, Salim decides to show off his prize diamond, which is, indeed, guarded securely. the entire floor is electrified, ands as deadly snake hovers over the jewel. Sabrina pretends to 'faint' upon seeing the snake, and Kelly makes a wax impression of the lock to the only window in the room. This, with the secret photos, provides Freddie with all he needs to engineer the theft. A little help from Ali is needed at last minute -- he never did like his father very much. Kate Jackson, Jaclyn Smith and Cheryl Ladd star as the Angels, Sabrina Duncan, Kelly Garrett and Kris Munroe, respectively, who work for Charlie, an unseen and very sophisticated boss who phones

programme.title: Angels In The Backfield
programme.desc: The Angels have never played football before, but that changes quickly when Amy Jarvis and her father Dan come to them for help.

programme.title: Angels In The Wings
programme.desc: Enrico Mancini's musical production is not going well. Ellen and Frank Jason, who starred in the show twenty years ago would be perfect for it now, but their marriage went bad and they dislike each other too much to work together. Frank, however, is in debt, and by having two brutes follow him around to remind him of that, Mancini hopes to pressure Frank into taking the job. Anton Metzger presents a different kind of problem, and it is to find him that the Angels are hired. Anton is now deranged and mute, but many years ago he was in love with another lady who performed this show in Europe, and he is determined to prevent anyone else from doing it. He haunts the rehearsals, dropping heavy objects from to terrify the crew. But no one even knows what he looks like, and he always disappears without a trace. Frank and Kris become very fond of each other, and since Kris did some acting in college, Frank says he will do the show, but only if Kris is his leading lady. They do an impressive song together, with Anton dreaming of his old love as he watches above. Ellen also performs a beautiful song, and Frank is so moved when he hears it that the two of them decide their marriage can still be saved. Kate Jackson, Jaclyn Smith. and Cheryl Ladd star as the Angels, Sabrina Duncan, Kelly Garrett and Kris Munroe, respectively, who work for Charlie, an unseen and very sophis-ticated boss who phones in their instructions. David Doyle stars as Bosley, Charlie's harried assistant.

programme.title: Magic Fire
programme.desc: Sabrina, Kelly and Kris invade the world of illusion to help a flame-throwing magician prove he is not the arsonist burning down fashion centers wherever he appears in "Magic Fire. Aging illusionist Wendell Muse is being hassled by cops across the land because suspicious fires keep breaking out in cities he plays. To clear his name, Muse hires the Angels, who bring their own bag of tricks to the caper. Kate Jackson, Jaclyn Smith. and Cheryl Ladd star as the Angels, Sabrina Duncan, Kelly Garrett and Kris Munroe, respectively, who work for Charlie, an unseen and very sophis-ticated boss who phones in their instructions. David Doyle stars as Bosley, Charlie's harried assistant.

programme.title: Sammy Davis Jr. Kidnap Caper
programme.desc: Kidnapers stalk Sammy Davis Jr., so Sabrina, Kelly and Kris are hired to protect him in "The Sammy Davis Jr. Kidnap Caper," guest starring Sammy Davis Jr. in twin roles as himself and as a guy who looks just like him, on "Charlie's Angels." The Angels become Sammy's bodyguards after an attempt has been made to snatch the superstar from the restroom of a restaurant. But when Sammy's look-alike -- an abrasive character named Herbert Brubaker III -- comes to visit Davis and his wife Altovise at their home, the kidnappers strike again, abducting Brubaker by mistake. The Angels set out to rescue Brubaker, who has his captors convinced he is the real Sammy, despite a hilarious "demonstration" of his talent. Kate Jackson, Jaclyn Smith. and Cheryl Ladd star as the Angels, Sabrina Duncan, Kelly Garrett and Kris Munroe, respectively, who work for Charlie, an unseen and very sophis-ticated boss who phones in their instructions. David Doyle stars as Bosley, Charlie's harried assistant.

programme.title: One Of Our Assemblymen Is Missing
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) takes to his soap box, delivering fiery, patriotic speeches after getting a bill from the State Farm Unattached Duty Tax for an outrageous $12.03! But no one can figure out why the tax is levied in the first place.

programme.title: The Good Old Days
programme.desc: Lisa (Eva Gabor) is curious to learn about the book that Oliver (Eddie Albert) is reading. It is the "real-life" story of pioneers Gus and Etta Thompson. The episode flashes back to the 19th century with Oliver appearing as Gus and Lisa as Etta.

programme.title: Eb Discovers The Birds And The Bees
programme.desc: Eb (Tom Lester) seeks dating advice from the Douglas's after laying eyes on former classmate Betty Jo Bradley from "petticoat Junction." Oliver's well-intentioned guidance has mixed results when Eb hilariously misconstrues the advice he's given.

programme.title: The Hooterville Image
programme.desc: The locals complain that Oliver's penchant for wearing business suits to do farm work is ruining Hooterville's image. Oliver tries to adjust, but the last laugh is on him when Lisa has her dressmaker design Italian him some swanky new overalls.

programme.title: You Ought To Be In Pictures
programme.desc: The Hooterville Chamber of Commerce attempts to attract a Hollywood film studio to shoot a movie in town. And when a rumor spreads that famous actor is arriving, the townsfolk are all abuzz as they prepare for their close-up, Mr. DeMille!

programme.title: A Home Isn't Built In A Day
programme.desc: Fed up with the house being in dire need of repair, Lisa demands that Oliver arrange to have the house redone or she's moving back to New York. Oliver agrees, but is delayed when Mr. Haney claims that their farmhouse is a historic monument.

programme.title: A Square Is Not Round
programme.desc: Everything is topsy-turvy and henhouse hijinks ensue when one of the Douglas' hens is found to be laying square eggs! News of this kind gets around quickly, and the townsfolk all get in on the race to capitalize on the impressive novelty.

programme.title: An Old Fashioned Christmas
programme.desc: Oliver is absolutely determined to have a truly old-fashioned Christmas, including decorating his own farm-grown tree. But warm weather stands in the way and, he discovers, the residents of Hooterville aren't exactly as traditional as he thought.

programme.title: Never Trust A Little Old Lady
programme.desc: In true Hooterville fashion, Oliver (Eddie Albert) discovers that the town is vehemently split as to which weather reporter they trust. As debates rage over which forecast is correct, Oliver plants his tomato crop, hoping for the best.

programme.title: School Days
programme.desc: After another disastrous effort from Lisa in the kitchen, Oliver implores her to take a home economics class at the local high school. Before she knows it, Lisa is a fully enrolled student...the likes of which Hooterville High has never quite seen.

programme.title: His Honor
programme.desc: When the Hooterville City Council appoints Oliver (Eddie Albert) to judge the apple competition at the annual fair, he mistakes the honor for a real judgeship and prepares for his time on the bench! But a run-in with the real law clarifies matters.

programme.title: It's So Peaceful In The Country
programme.desc: Lisa visits Oliver's mother who is recovering from an illness. The doctor advises that she rest in a peaceful environment...and thinks that Hooterville sounds absolutely ideal! Of course, he doesn't know Hooterville, where peace is never�very close.

programme.title: Exodus To Bleedswell
programme.desc: When Oliver (Eddie Albert) discovers that Hooterville has a still-valid contract to build war planes, he spearheads the opening of new government defense plant. But as chaos ensues, Oliver soon wonders if the move was a big mistake after all.

programme.title: It's Human To Be Humane
programme.desc: Lisa is appointed as head of Hooterville's new "Human Humane" committee. A perfect fit for animal-lover Lisa, and a relief from her boredom in the countryside, she soon has a menagerie of both farm and exotic animals living at Green Acres.

programme.title: Never Take Your Wife To A Convention
programme.desc: Oliver takes Lisa along to an agricultural convention. There, Lisa bonds with an ex-gangster couple, who insist upon teaching the Douglas's some of their shortcuts to successful farming. It turns out to be an offer that Oliver can not refuse.

programme.title: The Computer Age
programme.desc: Oliver champions agri-tech as way to increase productivity on the farm, but when a computer gives its assessment of the Douglas' marriage, Lisa (Eva Gabor) begins to question her union with Oliver. It's bits versus bytes in Green Acres!

programme.title: Lisa's Vegetable Garden
programme.desc: Determined to teach his spendthrift wife Lisa how to save money, Oliver insists that she learn about farming...by growing her own vegetables! In her own inimitable fashion, armed with useless pamphlets from Mr. Kimball, Lisa sets to tilling!

programme.title: Morticia, The Breadwinner
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family And The Spaceman
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: My Son, The Chimp
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: Morticia's Favorite Charity
programme.desc: Moriticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: Progress And The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: Uncle Fester's Toupee
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: Cousin Itt And The Vocational Counselor
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: Lurch, The Teenage Idol
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Winning Of Morticia Addams
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight, members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: My Fair Cousin Itt
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: Morticia's Romance (Part 1)
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: Morticia's Romance (Part 2)
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: Morticia Meets Royalty
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: Gomez, The People's Choice
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: Cousin Itt's Problem
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: Halloween, Addams Style
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: Morticia, The Writer
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it, he will lose her.

programme.title: My Classic Car
programme.desc: My Classic Car is a weekly television program that captures America's Love affair with the automobile! Dennis Gage, the handlebar mustachioed host, takes you along for the ride and keeps it entertaining with his unique perspective and enthusiasm.

programme.title: Unboxing a Mustang
programme.desc: Tony digs out a rare Mustang that's been hidden under dusty boxes for decades, but the owner has another surprise in store. Then Tony gets a chance to size up a Model A truck at an auction preview before he heads to the famous Spring Carlisle.

programme.title: Love Hurst
programme.desc: A Hurst Oldsmobile roars back to life.

programme.title: Oddballs and Icons
programme.desc: Tony helps prep a quirky, rare British TVR for sale and makes a play for one of the most elusive Camaros ever built, the legendary ZL1. When Tony is offered a rust-free '55 Chevy he knows it's too good of a deal to pass up.

programme.title: A Tale of Two DeLoreans
programme.desc: When a client puts out the call for a DeLorean, Tony finds two dramatically different contenders: one showroom-clean, the other frozen in time. It's nostalgia versus perfection as Tony helps figure out what's the best route for his client to take.

programme.title: Hot Rods and Porsches
programme.desc: Tony helps an owner move a custom Mercury to none other than Joe Zolper as a potential buyer. Then, a lead sends Tony to a dusty garage hiding a nearly untouched Porsche RS America with just 5,000 original miles.

programme.title: Mopar to Midair
programme.desc: Tony teams up with the Auto Archeologist, Ryan Brutt, to uncover one of the rarest Dodge Demons in existence. Then Tony follows the trail to make an offer on a movie-star, an Eleanor Mustang. With this deal, the sky's the limit!

programme.title: Wolf's Bane
programme.desc: Clues, including a prior encounter with Derek (Tyler Hoechlin), bring Jackson (Colton Haynes) to a dangerous revelation about Scott (Tyler Posey)…and his actions begin to threaten not only Scott's life, but his own as well.

programme.title: Co-Captain
programme.desc: With startling revelations weighing in on him, Scott (Tyler Posey) finds himself scrambling to protect the people he loves, including Allison (Crystal Reed) who begins to follow clues left by her Aunt Kate about her family history.

programme.title: Formality
programme.desc: While struggling with family secrets, Allison (Crystal Reed) focuses on the Winter Formal dance. Meanwhile, as the tensions between werewolves and hunters rise to a boiling point, Scott (Tyler Posey) struggles to protect both friends and enemies.

programme.title: Code Breaker
programme.desc: In the season finale, Scott McCall (Tyler Posey) discovers one last clue which allows him to enlist both friends -- and even a previous enemy -- in order to stop the mysterious killings and win back Allison (Crystal Reed), the girl he loves.

programme.title: Omega
programme.desc: When Lydia (Holland Roden) goes missing from the hospital, werewolves and hunters alike begin a search to discover not only where she is, but what she may have become. Meanwhile Jackson's (Colton Haynes) body seems to be fighting against the bite.

programme.title: Shape Shifted
programme.desc: The night before a full moon, Isaac's father (John Wesley Shipp) is murdered. When Isaac (Daniel Sharman) is arrested, Scott (Tyler Posey), Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) and Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) resolve to break him out before the Argents get to him.

programme.title: Ice Pick
programme.desc: Scott (Tyler Posey) tries to stop Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) from creating new werewolves, while Chris Argent (JR Bourne) decides to officially begin Allison's (Crystal Reed) training. Meanwhile, the new creature in Beacon Hills takes another victim.

programme.title: Abomination
programme.desc: When the shapeshifter strikes again, Scott (Tyler Posey) has to recruit a reluctant Allison (Crystal Reed) to acquire a rare book from Gerard's (guest star Michael Hogan) collection, while also once again surviving dinner with the Argents.

programme.title: Venomous
programme.desc: Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) becomes convinced that Lydia (Holland Roden) is the shapeshifter they're after since she seemed immune to its toxin, forcing Scott (Tyler Posey) to gather his friends -- and even some enemies -- to protect her.

programme.title: Frenemy
programme.desc: With startling new information about the shapeshifter, Scott (Tyler Posey) and Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) hurry to protect their friends while Allison (Crystal Reed) is given an investigative task by her family. And there is "panic at the disco."

programme.title: Restraint
programme.desc: Lydia (Holland Roden) makes connections about the bite from Peter (Ian Bohen). Jackson (Colton Haynes) causes problems for Scott (Tyler Posey) and Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) while Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) has a crisis of faith in his leadership abilities.

programme.title: Corner Of The Eye
programme.desc: When Father Anton, a priest who has been questioning his faith, stumbles and hits his head, he suddenly begins to see demons all about him. When those demons bestow upon him the power over life and death, he uses it...but nothing comes without a cost.

programme.title: Under The Bed
programme.desc: When Sharon Rosman's son is abducted his 6-year-old sister in the only witness but is far too traumatized to speak. When psychologist John Holland comes to work with the young girl, she tells him it was the boogeyman...from under the bed.

programme.title: Dark Matters
